title: Kazene Trace Receipt
description: A minimal structured receipt for AI-assisted creation, transformation, routing, and derivative events without storing raw content by default.

id.description: Unique identifier for this trace receipt.

version.description: Protocol version used by this receipt.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the trace event occurred.

chain_id.description: Optional identifier for a future trace chain or distributed ledger reference.

child_traces.description: Optional lightweight references to immediate downstream trace receipts.

type.description: Type of actor that performed the event.

id.description: Actor identifier. This may be pseudonymous or hashed.

role.description: Role of the actor in this trace event.

source_refs.description: Sources referenced by this trace event.

type.description: Type of source referenced by the event.

ref_hash.description: Hash or structured reference for the source. Raw content should not be stored here.

visibility.description: Visibility level of the referenced source.

intent.description: Purpose or intent of the transformation.

model_or_tool.description: Model, AI system, software, tool, or process used.

model_version.description: Version of the model or tool, if known. Use 'unknown' when unavailable.

compute_provider.description: Compute or service provider used for the transformation.

output_hash.description: Hash or structured reference for the output. Raw output content should not be stored here.

derivative_level.description: Provisional indication of how derivative the output is. This is not a legal or economic judgment.

contribution_type.description: Lightweight hint about the contribution type.

estimated_influence.description: Optional provisional influence estimate from 0.0 to 1.0. This is not a final attribution score.

consent_status.description: Consent status for the referenced material or action.

raw_content_stored.description: Whether raw source or output content is stored in the trace record. Default recommendation is false.

reversible.description: Whether the trace can be reversed to recover sensitive content.

retention.description: Retention level for this trace receipt.

zero_knowledge_proof.description: Optional future reference to a zero-knowledge proof or privacy-preserving verification artifact.

expires_at.description: Optional expiration timestamp for lifecycle-based forgetting or review.

forgetting_action.description: Recommended lifecycle action for this trace receipt.

royalty_route.description: Future royalty or value routing hint. This does not calculate payment.

attribution_required.description: Whether attribution may be required for this trace.

human_review_required.description: Whether this trace receipt requires human review.
